fields.title: backlog: add custom update result rendering
fields.description: Render backlog update tool results with the same compact issue row presentation as create/show flows instead of falling back to generic output in contexts where update lacks a dedicated render path.
fields.design: Add explicit renderer coverage and tests for backlog update so tool calls render the update command plus cwd, and results render a separator plus one inline issue summary row. Keep update rendering centralized in backlog/tool.ts with no fallback formatting logic.
fields.acceptance_criteria: A backlog update tool invocation renders with the backlog command header and cwd when present, and its result renders a compact issue summary block like the existing issue list rows. Regression tests cover the dedicated update rendering behavior.
